prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on molecular oxygen (O₂) performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') via PySCF (UKS, open-shell triplet), in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3. Geometry was taken from the user-supplied .xyz file as-is (single point, not re-optimized). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings were reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true.

Headline result — HOMO–LUMO gap: 5.2880586 eV.
HOMO (index 15): −8.8739616 eV (degenerate with HOMO−1 at index 14, consistent with O₂ π* SOMOs).
LUMO (index 16): −3.5859031 eV (degenerate with LUMO+1).
Total electronic energy: −150.38872 Ha / −4092.2855 eV.

Koopmans-theorem estimates: vertical IP = 8.8740 eV, vertical EA = 3.5859 eV, electronegativity = 6.2299 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6440 eV.

CLI: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --charge 0 --mult 3 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard [input.xyz] --out [live.json]
